source_jobs.title: Full-Stack Developer Intern, Music & Audio
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Melotech is revolutionizing media and entertainment. We create art through technology for humans to enjoy. In just 24 months, our work has been heard, watched and loved for over 3 billion minutes worldwide.

Founded by entrepreneur and investor Soheil Mirpour, we are backed by top VCs Cherry Ventures, Speedinvest and GFC, alongside world-class angels from firms such as Spotify, Blackstone and KKR.




WHAT YOU WILL DO

As one of our first developers, you will bridge the gap between beautifully designed frontends and scalable backends. You'll tackle the big questions: How do we build systems that scale while maintaining simplicity? What’s the fastest way to ship the right amount of function? And how do we leverage AI in every part of our process? Working fully autonomously alongside our founder and the team, your answers to these questions will directly influence our company's success. On a typical day, your tasks may include:

 - Owning features across our full stack, writing clean code for both frontend and backend systems

 - Working directly with commercial teams to architect and implement platform enhancements

 - Using AI coding assistants and modern development tools to accelerate workflows and maintain code quality

 - Building robust APIs and integrating AI models into production systems

 - Designing end-to-end solutions that combine individual data flows into unified models across verticals

 - Thinking of creative ideas and making bold decisions that shape our technology platform




WHO YOU ARE

We're looking for creative, ambitious and skilled full-stack engineers who can drive our business with technical solutions. You're someone who doesn't just write code, you translate ideas into software that is easy yet powerful, leveraging AI-enhanced workflows to deliver production-ready MVPs at lightspeed. Typically, your profile will look like this:

 - Pursuing a degree in CS or related field with full-stack development experience

 - Proficient in core programming languages with hands-on experience in modern web frameworks (preferably Node.js/Next.js) and databases

 - Expert with AI coding tools and development agents as part of your standard workflow

 - Experience building and deploying production-ready full-stack applications

 - Strong collaboration skills across commercial, product, and technical teams

 - Always on the forefront of adopting the latest development technologies

 - You thrive in a fast-paced and performance-oriented environment

 - Colleagues would describe you as hard-working, ambitious and persistent

 - You’re obsessed with music, video or social media




WHAT MAKES THIS EXCITING

You are one of the first employees of an ambitious team, changing the world of media and entertainment. Being early means every decision you make shapes our trajectory. You're not a cog in the machine but the captain of your own ship, rewarded for performance and respected for leadership. Flat hierarchies mean that your voice matters, your ideas get implemented, and your impact is immediate.

We pay competitive salaries and make you an owner of the business with equity. We work remotely to give you complete freedom over your life, while meeting regularly around the world for global offsites where we strategize, bond, and push boundaries together.




WHAT THE PROCESS WILL LOOK LIKE

We hire on a rolling basis. Earliest starting date is always ASAP.

Once you begin our process, you can progress from start to offer within a week, depending on how quickly you can move through each stage:

 1. Online assessment: Motivational questionnaire and aptitude test - are you made for the job?

 2. Initial interview: 30-minute introductory call - getting to know you

 3. Take-home case study: Real-world project - showcase your skills and working style

 4. Case interview: 90-minute case discussion - present and debate your results with a team member

 5. Founder interview: 90-minute interview with our CEO - going deep

source_jobs.title: Entrepreneur in Residence (Intern)
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Melotech is revolutionizing media and entertainment. We create art through technology for humans to enjoy. In just 24 months, our work has been heard, watched and loved for over 3 billion minutes worldwide.

Founded by entrepreneur and investor Soheil Mirpour, we are backed by top VCs Cherry Ventures, Speedinvest and GFC, alongside world-class angels from firms such as Spotify, Blackstone and KKR.




WHAT YOU WILL DO

Your role as Entrepreneur in Residence (Intern) is to identify and develop new market opportunities into sustainable business ventures, expanding our platform by exploring emerging markets, building strategic partnerships, and launching new verticals from conception to scale. Working fully autonomously alongside our founder, your decisions will directly influence our company's trajectory and success. On a typical day, your tasks may include:

 - Identifying and validating market opportunities across media categories, geographies and platforms

 - Building automated systems and operational frameworks that enable rapid scaling across multiple verticals and distribution channels

 - Leading cross-functional initiatives that integrate new business lines with existing operations

 - Designing and executing strategic experiments across market entry, partnership models, and go-to-market strategies

 - Establishing partnerships with industry leaders, technology platforms, and distribution networks to accelerate business expansion

 - Developing comprehensive market entry strategies and operational blueprints for new business verticals




WHO YOU ARE

You're an upcoming business development professional with expertise in building new ventures in dynamic, high-growth environments. You excel at identifying market opportunities, validating business concepts through systematic experimentation, and executing comprehensive business development strategies while operating independently with minimal oversight. Typically, your profile will look like this:

 - Pursuing degree in Business, Economics, Engineering, Mathematics, or related analytical field from a top-tier university

 - Direct venture development and business building experience in high-growth startups or indirectly via Tier 1 consultancies and leading investment firms

 - Proficiency in business model innovation, operational system design, and strategic financial modelling

 - Self-starter who excels with minimal guidance and has demonstrable experience building initiatives from concept to execution

 - Strategic thinker with exceptional execution capabilities and proven track record translating market insights into successful business outcomes

 - You thrive in a fast-paced and performance-oriented environment

 - Colleagues would describe you as hard-working, ambitious and persistent

 - You’re obsessed with music, video or social media




WHAT MAKES THIS EXCITING

You are one of the first employees of an ambitious team, changing the world of media and entertainment. Being early means every decision you make shapes our trajectory. You're not a cog in the machine but the captain of your own ship, rewarded for performance and respected for leadership. Flat hierarchies mean that your voice matters, your ideas get implemented, and your impact is immediate.

We pay competitive salaries and make you an owner of the business with equity. We work remotely to give you complete freedom over your life, while meeting regularly around the world for global offsites where we strategize, bond, and push boundaries together.




WHAT THE PROCESS WILL LOOK LIKE

We hire on a rolling basis. Earliest starting date is always ASAP.

Once you begin our process, you can progress from start to offer within a week, depending on how quickly you can move through each stage:

 1. Online assessment: Motivational questionnaire and aptitude test - are you made for the job?

 2. Initial interview: 30-minute introductory call - getting to know you

 3. Take-home case study: Real-world p

source_jobs.title: Founding Product Engineer
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Melotech is revolutionizing media and entertainment. We create art through technology for humans to enjoy. In just 24 months, our work has been heard, watched and loved for over 3 billion minutes worldwide.

Founded by entrepreneur and investor Soheil Mirpour, we are backed by top VCs Cherry Ventures, Speedinvest and GFC, alongside world-class angels from firms such as Spotify, Blackstone and KKR.

 


WHAT YOU WILL DO

Melotech is starting something new. On top of everything we have already shipped, we are building a brand-new consumer product from zero, and you are its founding product hire. There is no product yet, so you own what we build and why. You will define, prototype and ship the first version from a blank page, then own the loops that turn a first-time user into a daily one. Working fully autonomously alongside our founder, your product bets directly decide whether people come back. We will walk you through exactly what we are building as you go through the process. On a typical day, your tasks may include:

 - Defining and shipping v1 of a new consumer product from scratch, prototyping fast and cutting anything that doesn't earn its place

 - Owning the product end to end, from user research to shipped features, across the full stack of the experience

 - Living in the numbers: retention, DAU and the engagement loops that shape our trajectory

 - Running user interviews constantly and turning what you hear into product people love

 - Building with AI as a default primitive, not a bolt-on, using modern tools to go from idea to production-ready MVP at lightspeed

 - Making bold product calls and creative bets that shape our roadmap and our company

 


WHO YOU ARE

We're looking for a builder who happens to be a product person, or a product person who can build. You've shipped consumer product that real people used and came back to, and you know exactly why they did.

Typically, your profile will look like this:

 - 3 or more years of experience, with real time as an engineer or working shoulder to shoulder with engineering

 - You've built and launched a B2C product at genuine engagement, ideally in music, media or streaming, though any high-engagement consumer product counts

 - You understand what locks users in: retention, engagement loops, habit formation

 - Equal parts user-obsessed and numbers-driven. You run the interviews and you decide off the data, and you need both

 - AI-native, with AI woven through how you research, design and build

 - You come from an early-stage, high-growth consumer company, or you started one yourself. You think like a founder because you have been early before

 - You thrive in a fast-paced and performance-oriented environment

 - You're obsessed with music, video or social media

 


WHAT MAKES THIS EXCITING

You are one of the first people on a brand-new product, inside an ambitious team that is changing the world of media and entertainment. Being this early means every decision you make shapes its trajectory. You're not a cog in the machine but the captain of your own ship, rewarded for performance and respected for leadership. Flat hierarchies mean that your voice matters, your ideas get implemented, and your impact is immediate.

We pay competitive salaries and make you an owner of the business with equity. We work remotely to give you complete freedom over your life, while meeting regularly around the world for global offsites where we strategize, bond, and push boundaries together.

 


WHAT THE PROCESS WILL LOOK LIKE

We hire on a rolling basis. Earliest starting date is always ASAP.

Once you begin our process, you can progress from start to offer within a week, depending on how quickly you can move through each stage:

 1. Initial interview: 30-minute introductory call - getting to know you

 2. Case interview: 90-minute case discussion - present and debate your skills

 3. Founder interview: 90-minute interview with our CEO - going deep on all topics

 4

source_jobs.title: Data Science, Music & Audio
source_jobs.description:
Who we are

Melotech is revolutionizing media and entertainment. We create art through technology for humans to enjoy. In just 24 months, our work has been heard, watched and loved for over 3 billion minutes worldwide.

Founded by entrepreneur and investor Soheil Mirpour, we are backed by top VCs Cherry Ventures, Speedinvest and GFC, alongside world-class angels from firms such as Spotify, Blackstone and KKR.

What you will do

Join us as our first dedicated Data Scientist to bring order to the chaos of culture. You'll extract insights from hard-to-reach data sources to tackle the big questions: What cultural trends are emerging that everyone else is missing? How can we predict virality? And what factors characterize an underserved category? Working fully autonomously alongside our founder and the team, your answers to these questions will directly influence our company's success. On a typical day, your tasks may include:


 - Discovering and exploiting new, untapped data sources through creative scraping techniques

 - Building data processing pipelines from scratch to handle raw, unstructured data

 - Using LLMs and agentic coding tools to accelerate data cleaning and analysis workflows

 - Spinning up EC2 instances for real-time data collection and automated scraping operations

 - Prototyping and deploying ML models on AWS for real-time predictions and content analysis

 - Creating custom dashboards and reports to communicate insights to leadership

 - Analyzing trends, audience behavior, and performance metrics to guide business decisions

Who you are

We look for battle-tested data scientists who understand that real impact comes from turning messy, unstructured data into business-critical insights that drive company direction. You're someone who doesn't just build models, you solve complex business problems by finding creative ways to access hard-to-reach data and translate statistical findings into actionable strategies. Typically, your profile will look like this:


 - Degree in Data Science, Statistics, CS, Physics, Math, or related quantitative/technical field

 - 3+ years of hands-on data science experience in fast-paced business environments across Tier 1 consultancies, Big Tech companies, high-growth start-ups and scale-ups, or media industry leaders

 - Expert-level Python proficiency with standard data science and ML frameworks

 - Experience scraping and acquiring raw data from new sources, building creative solutions to access hard-to-reach datasets beyond standard APIs

 - Extensive hands-on experience with agentic coding tools and LLMs for data workflows

 - Production model deployment experience including infrastructure and monitoring

 - Advanced data visualization skills using standard libraries or Tableau

 - Strong collaboration skills across engineering, product, and business teams

 - You thrive in a fast-paced and performance-oriented environment

 - Colleagues would describe you as hard-working, ambitious and persistent

 - You’re obsessed with music, video or social media

What makes this exciting

You are one of the first employees of an ambitious team, changing the world of media and entertainment. Being early means every decision you make shapes our trajectory. You're not a cog in the machine but the captain of your own ship, rewarded for performance and respected for leadership. Flat hierarchies mean that your voice matters, your ideas get implemented, and your impact is immediate.

We pay competitive salaries and make you an owner of the business with equity. We work remotely to give you complete freedom over your life, while meeting regularly around the world for global offsites where we strategize, bond, and push boundaries together.

What the process will look like

We hire on a rolling basis. Earliest starting date is always ASAP.

Once you begin our process, you can progress from start to offer within a week, depending on how quickly you can move through each stage:

 1. Online assessmen

source_jobs.title: Founders Associate
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Melotech is revolutionizing media and entertainment. We create art through technology for humans to enjoy. In just 24 months, our work has been heard, watched and loved for over 3 billion minutes worldwide.

Founded by entrepreneur and investor Soheil Mirpour, we are backed by top VCs Cherry Ventures, Speedinvest and GFC, alongside world-class angels from firms such as Spotify, Blackstone and KKR.




WHAT YOU WILL DO

As our Founders Associate, you'll be a right hand to our CEO and execute our strategy across all topics and areas. You tackle the critical questions: Where is the market going and how do we position ourselves to benefit? Which data can point us into the right direction strategically? And how do we scale our internal processes and systems for maximum success? Working fully autonomously alongside our founder, your decisions will directly influence our company's trajectory and success. On a typical day, your tasks may include:

 - Managing high-impact projects from conception to completion across all business verticals

 - Preparing presentations, reports, and briefing documents while tracking KPIs and compiling performance updates

 - Conducting market, competitor, and investor research to identify growth opportunities and support strategic decisions

 - Supporting fundraising by creating pitch materials, organizing investor outreach, and maintaining partner relations

 - Streamlining workflows, improving operational processes, and handling recruiting at scale with the help of AI

 - Acting as a sparring partner for the founder in prioritizing and executing strategic projects across different areas of the business.




WHO YOU ARE

You're a strategic operator with deep analytical expertise. Your strength lies in translating a vision into an actionable plan while maintaining meticulous attention to detail. You've worked directly with leadership teams to drive critical initiatives and excel at communicating across engineering, product, and business functions. Typically, your profile will look like this:

 - Hold a degree in Business, Economics, Mathematics, or a highly analytical field from a globally top-tier university

 - Bring at least 1 year of proven, high-impact professional experience from elite management consultancies, bulge bracket investment banks, Big Tech, leading PE/VC funds, or as an early team member at venture-backed, hyper-growth startups

 - Demonstrate exceptional analytical and communication skills, with a track record of turning complex data into clear, actionable insights that drive executive-level decision-making

 - Are highly autonomous: you thrive when given minimal guidance and are trusted to independently lead and deliver multiple strategic projects under tight deadlines

 - Have a clear track record of working directly with C-level executives to drive measurable impact in scaling and strategy

 - Excel in high-pressure, performance-driven environments, consistently delivering beyond expectations. High stakes, fast pace, and constant change energize you, not drain you

 - Your colleagues consistently describe you as uncompromisingly hard-working, relentlessly ambitious, and fiercely persistent – you do not stop until the result is achieved

 - You are obsessed with music, video, or social media. It's part of your identity, not just a hobby, and you are eager to shape the future of this industry




WHAT MAKES THIS EXCITING

You are one of the first employees of an ambitious team, changing the world of media and entertainment. Being early means every decision you make shapes our trajectory. You're not a cog in the machine but the captain of your own ship, rewarded for performance and respected for leadership. Flat hierarchies mean that your voice matters, your ideas get implemented, and your impact is immediate.

We pay competitive salaries and make you an owner of the business with equity. We work remotely to give you complete freedom over your life, while meeting regularly

source_jobs.title: AI/ML Engineer
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Melotech is revolutionizing media and entertainment. We create art through technology for humans to enjoy. In just 24 months, our work has been heard, watched and loved for over 3 billion minutes worldwide.

Founded by entrepreneur and investor Soheil Mirpour, we are backed by top VCs Cherry Ventures, Speedinvest and GFC, alongside world-class angels from firms such as Spotify, Blackstone and KKR.




WHAT YOU WILL DO

As our ML Engineer, you'll be the technical backbone powering our content platform. You'll tackle the critical questions: How do we build ML systems that scale to millions of users while maintaining low latency? What's the optimal architecture for training and deploying models that understand cultural trends in real-time? And how do we leverage cutting-edge models to enhance creative processes while preserving quality? Working fully autonomously alongside our founder and the team, your answers to these questions will directly influence our company's success. On a typical day, your tasks may include:

 - Building and deploying production ML models for within our content and product ecosystem

 - Designing scalable ML infrastructure and pipelines that handle massive media datasets

 - Implementing inference systems for content optimization across multiple verticals

 - Fine-tuning and deploying multimodal AI systems using MLOps best practices

 - Collaborating with data science teams to transition research models into production-ready systems

 - Optimizing model performance for cost efficiency while maintaining accuracy and speed requirements

 - Integrating ML capabilities into existing platforms and building APIs for seamless model consumption




WHO YOU ARE

You're a production-focused ML engineer who bridges the gap between cutting-edge tech and scalable systems. Your expertise lies in building robust ML infrastructure that powers real-world applications at scale. You thrive in fast-paced environments where your technical decisions directly impact business outcomes and user experiences. Typically, your profile will look like this:

 - Degree in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Mathematics, Engineering, or related technical field

 - 3+ years of hands-on ML engineering experience building production systems at Big Tech companies, high-growth startups, or media/entertainment platforms

 - Expert-level proficiency in Python, ML frameworks, and cloud platforms

 - Extensive experience with MLOps tools and practices including Docker, Kubernetes, model versioning, and monitoring systems

 - Proven track record deploying and scaling ML models in production environments with high availability requirements

 - Self-directed approach with ability to architect complex systems independently while collaborating across technical teams

 - You thrive in a fast-paced and performance-oriented environment

 - Colleagues would describe you as hard-working, ambitious and persistent

 - You're obsessed with music, video or social media




WHAT MAKES THIS EXCITING

You are one of the first employees of an ambitious team, changing the world of media and entertainment. Being early means every decision you make shapes our trajectory. You're not a cog in the machine but the captain of your own ship, rewarded for performance and respected for leadership. Flat hierarchies mean that your voice matters, your ideas get implemented, and your impact is immediate.

We pay competitive salaries and make you an owner of the business with equity. We work remotely to give you complete freedom over your life, while meeting regularly around the world for global offsites where we strategize, bond, and push boundaries together.




WHAT THE PROCESS WILL LOOK LIKE

We hire on a rolling basis. Earliest starting date is always ASAP.

Once you begin our process, you can progress from start to offer within a week, depending on how quickly you can move through each stage:

 1. Take-home case study: Real-world project - showcase your skills

source_jobs.title: Head of People
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Melotech is revolutionizing media and entertainment. We create art through technology for humans to enjoy. In just 24 months, our work has been heard, watched and loved for over 3 billion minutes worldwide.

Founded by entrepreneur and investor Soheil Mirpour, we are backed by top VCs Cherry Ventures, Speedinvest and GFC, alongside world-class angels from firms such as Spotify, Blackstone and KKR.

 

What you will do

Your role as Head of People is to build the recruiting engine that scales Melotech, personally hiring the 10 to 20 exceptional people who will shape our next chapter across product, engineering, go-to-market and creative, and then to build the people function beneath them. Working hand in hand with our founders, you own talent end to end.

 

On a typical day, your tasks may include:

 - Owning outbound recruiting from start to finish: sourcing, screening and running most of the interview loop yourself, across technical, commercial and creative roles

 - Building a scalable hiring machine with outbound at its core, extending over time into university hiring, hackathons and referral networks

 - Acting as the first filter: knowing what exceptional looks like and where it comes from, so only the top of the funnel ever reaches our founders

 - Building talent pipelines across both Europe and the US

 - Standing up the people function as we scale: contracts, levelling, performance reviews, compensation, bonuses and benefits

 - Designing the internal systems and workflows a fast-growing, globally distributed team needs

 

Who you are

You're a talent professional who has personally scaled a high-growth company through its most exciting years, and you're hungry to do it again, hands on. You know what exceptional looks like, where to find it, and how to close it, and you bring both a network and a repeatable process.

Typically, your profile will look like this:

 - 3+ years of experience in Talent Acquisition or Recruitment roles with demonstrated strategic impact; proven track record in high-growth or scale-up environments preferred

 - Recruiter or early people hire at a top-tier, high-growth consumer or AI startup, where you personally scaled the team through early growth

 - AI-native: you use AI in your own workflow and can credibly recruit for an AI-native company

 - Comfortable hiring across both Europe and the US, ideally from a remote or internationally distributed team

 - A real network and a systematic, repeatable process, not just a knack for people

 - Bonus: experience hiring creative talent too (video, visual, artists), not only engineers and commercial roles

 - Genuinely passionate about recruiting: it's the craft you want to keep doing

 - Colleagues would describe you as hard-working, ambitious and persistent

 

What makes this exciting

You are one of the first employees of an ambitious team, changing the world of media and entertainment. As the person who hires everyone who comes after you, your fingerprints will be on the entire company. Being early means every decision you make shapes our trajectory. You're not a cog in the machine but the captain of your own ship, rewarded for performance and respected for leadership. Flat hierarchies mean that your voice matters, your ideas get implemented, and your impact is immediate.

We pay competitive salaries and make you an owner of the business with equity. We work remotely to give you complete freedom over your life, while meeting regularly around the world for global offsites where we strategize, bond, and push boundaries together.

 

What the process will look like

We hire on a rolling basis. Earliest starting date is always ASAP.

Once you begin our process, you can progress from start to offer within a week, depending on how quickly you can move through each stage:

 1. Initial interview: 30-minute introductory call - getting to know you

 2. Founder interview: 60-minute interview with our CEO - going deep on all topics

 3. Off

source_jobs.title: AI/ML Engineer Intern
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Melotech is revolutionizing media and entertainment. We create art through technology for humans to enjoy. In just 24 months, our work has been heard, watched and loved for over 3 billion minutes worldwide.

Founded by entrepreneur and investor Soheil Mirpour, we are backed by top VCs Cherry Ventures, Speedinvest and GFC, alongside world-class angels from firms such as Spotify, Blackstone and KKR.




WHAT YOU WILL DO

As our ML Engineer Intern, you'll be the technical backbone powering our content platform. You'll tackle the critical questions: How do we build ML systems that scale to millions of users while maintaining low latency? What's the optimal architecture for training and deploying models that understand cultural trends in real-time? And how do we leverage cutting-edge models to enhance creative processes while preserving quality? Working fully autonomously alongside our founder and the team, your answers to these questions will directly influence our company's success. On a typical day, your tasks may include:

 - Building and deploying production ML models for within our content and product ecosystem

 - Designing scalable ML infrastructure and pipelines that handle massive media datasets

 - Implementing inference systems for content optimization across multiple verticals

 - Fine-tuning and deploying multimodal AI systems using MLOps best practices

 - Collaborating with data science teams to transition research models into production-ready systems

 - Optimizing model performance for cost efficiency while maintaining accuracy and speed requirements

 - Integrating ML capabilities into existing platforms and building APIs for seamless model consumption




WHO YOU ARE

You're a production-focused upcoming ML engineer who bridges the gap between cutting-edge tech and scalable systems. Your expertise lies in building robust ML infrastructure that powers real-world applications at scale. You thrive in fast-paced environments where your technical decisions directly impact business outcomes and user experiences. Typically, your profile will look like this:

 - Pursuing a degree in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Mathematics, Engineering, or related technical field

 - Hands-on ML engineering experience building production systems at Big Tech companies, high-growth startups, or media/entertainment platforms

 - Proficiency in Python, ML frameworks, and cloud platforms

 - Self-directed approach with ability to architect complex systems independently while collaborating across technical teams

 - You thrive in a fast-paced and performance-oriented environment

 - Colleagues would describe you as hard-working, ambitious and persistent

 - You're obsessed with music, video or social media

You are one of the first employees of an ambitious team, changing the world of media and entertainment. Being early means every decision you make shapes our trajectory. You're not a cog in the machine but the captain of your own ship, rewarded for performance and respected for leadership. Flat hierarchies mean that your voice matters, your ideas get implemented, and your impact is immediate.

We pay competitive salaries and make you an owner of the business with equity. We work remotely to give you complete freedom over your life, while meeting regularly around the world for global offsites where we strategize, bond, and push boundaries together.




WHAT THE PROCESS WILL LOOK LIKE

We hire on a rolling basis. Earliest starting date is always ASAP.

Once you begin our process, you can progress from start to offer within a week, depending on how quickly you can move through each stage:

 1. Take-home case study: Real-world project - showcase your skills and working style

 2. Case interview: 90-minute case discussion - getting to know you & present and debate your results with a team member

 3. Online assessment: Motivational questionnaire and aptitude test - are you made for the job?

 4. Fo

source_jobs.title: Data Science Intern, Music & Audio
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Melotech is revolutionizing media and entertainment. We create art through technology for humans to enjoy. In just 24 months, our work has been heard, watched and loved for over 3 billion minutes worldwide.

Founded by entrepreneur and investor Soheil Mirpour, we are backed by top VCs Cherry Ventures, Speedinvest and GFC, alongside world-class angels from firms such as Spotify, Blackstone and KKR.




WHAT YOU WILL DO

Join us as Data Scientist Intern to bring order to the chaos of culture. You'll extract insights from hard-to-reach data sources to tackle the big questions: What cultural trends are emerging that everyone else is missing? How can we predict virality? And what factors characterize an underserved category? Working fully autonomously alongside our founder and the team, your answers to these questions will directly influence our company's success. On a typical day, your tasks may include:

 - Discovering and exploiting new, untapped data sources through creative scraping techniques

 - Building data processing pipelines from scratch to handle raw, unstructured data

 - Using LLMs and agentic coding tools to accelerate data cleaning and analysis workflows

 - Spinning up EC2 instances for real-time data collection and automated scraping operations

 - Prototyping and deploying ML models on AWS for real-time predictions and content analysis

 - Creating custom dashboards and reports to communicate insights to leadership

 - Analyzing trends, audience behavior, and performance metrics to guide business decisions




WHO YOU ARE

We look for upcoming Data Scientists who understand that real impact comes from turning messy, unstructured data into business-critical insights that drive company direction. You're someone who doesn't just build models, you solve complex business problems by finding creative ways to access hard-to-reach data and translate statistical findings into actionable strategies. Typically, your profile will look like this:

 - Pursuing degree in Data Science, Statistics, CS, Physics, Math, or related quantitative/technical field

 - Hands-on data science experience in fast-paced business environments across Tier 1 consultancies, Big Tech companies, high-growth start-ups and scale-ups, or media industry leaders

 - Expert-level Python proficiency with standard data science and ML frameworks

 - Experience scraping and acquiring raw data from new sources, building creative solutions to access hard-to-reach datasets beyond standard APIs

 - Extensive hands-on experience with agentic coding tools and LLMs for data workflows

 - Production model deployment experience including infrastructure and monitoring

 - Advanced data visualization skills using standard libraries or Tableau

 - Strong collaboration skills across engineering, product, and business teams
